# Vježba 6: Sile na zakrivljene plohe

### Osnove: Sile na zakrivljene plohe

Za razliku od ravnih ploha, kod zakrivljenih ploha vektori tlaka mijenjaju smjer (uvijek su okomiti na površinu). Zbog toga ukupnu silu izračunavamo preko njezinih komponenti:

1.  **Horizontalna komponenta ($F_H$):** Jednaka je hidrostatskoj sili na **vertikalnu projekciju** zakrivljene plohe.
2.  **Vertikalna komponenta ($F_V$):** Jednaka je **težini tekućine** (stvarne ili zamišljene) u volumenu iznad zakrivljene plohe.
3.  **Rezultanta ($F_R$):** $F_R = \sqrt{F_H^2 + F_V^2}$. Kod kružnih ploha, rezultanta uvijek prolazi kroz **centar zakrivljenosti**.

```{=html}
<!-- NOVI WIDGET: Radijalni tlak na zakrivljenu plohu -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-curved-pressure" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 30px auto;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
">
    <!-- Header with Gradient -->
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b 0%, #334155 100%); padding: 25px 35px; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.025em;">
            Vizualizacija sila na zakrivljenu plohu
        </h3>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.95rem;">Radijalni tlak vs. hidrostatske komponente</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Controls Section -->
        <div style="padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Dubina vrha (h₁)</label>
                        <span id="h1-val-curved" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">2.0 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="h1-slider-curved" min="0" max="6" value="2.0" step="0.2" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Polumjer (R)</label>
                        <span id="r-val-curved" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">1.5 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="r-slider-curved" min="0.5" max="2.5" value="1.5" step="0.1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 15px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Metrike rezultante</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;">
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.85rem;">
                            <span style="color: #64748b;">Kut α:</span>
                            <span id="alpha-out-curved" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">0.0°</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.85rem;">
                            <span style="color: #64748b;">Ukupna F_R:</span>
                            <span id="fr-out-curved" style="font-weight: 700; color: #f59e0b;">0.0 kN</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Canvas Area -->
        <div style="padding: 25px; background: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px;">
                <div style="position: relative; height: 320px; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; overflow: hidden;">
                    <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; z-index: 10;">Radijalni tlak</div>
                    <canvas id="canvas-radial" width="300" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                </div>
                <div style="position: relative; height: 320px; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; overflow: hidden;">
                    <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; z-index: 10;">Komponente (FH, FV)</div>
                    <canvas id="canvas-comp" width="300" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Bottom Metrics Dashboard -->
            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px;">
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #3b82f6; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #1e40af; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;">FH [kN]</span>
                    <span id="fh-out-curved" style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e3a8a; font-family: monospace;">0.0</span>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #22c55e; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
                    <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #15803d; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;">FV [kN]</span>
                    <span id="fv-out-curved" style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #064e3b; font-family: monospace;">0.0</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const cRad = document.getElementById('canvas-radial');
        const cComp = document.getElementById('canvas-comp');
        const ctxR = cRad.getContext('2d');
        const ctxC = cComp.getContext('2d');
        
        const h1Sl = document.getElementById('h1-slider-curved');
        const rSl = document.getElementById('r-slider-curved');

        function update() {
            const h1 = parseFloat(h1Sl.value);
            const R = parseFloat(rSl.value);
            const b = 1.0; const rho = 1000; const g = 9.81;

            document.getElementById('h1-val-curved').textContent = h1.toFixed(1) + ' m';
            document.getElementById('r-val-curved').textContent = R.toFixed(1) + ' m';

            // Fizika
            const FH = (rho * g * (h1 + R/2) * (R * b)) / 1000;
            const FV = (rho * g * (h1 * R + (Math.PI*R*R/4)) * b) / 1000;
            const FR = Math.sqrt(FH*FH + FV*FV);
            const alpha = Math.atan2(FV, FH) * 180 / Math.PI;

            document.getElementById('fh-out-curved').textContent = FH.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('fv-out-curved').textContent = FV.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('fr-out-curved').textContent = FR.toFixed(1) + ' kN';
            document.getElementById('alpha-out-curved').textContent = alpha.toFixed(1) + '°';

            drawRadial(h1, R, rho, g);
            drawComp(h1, R, FH, FV);
        }

        function drawRadial(h1, R, rho, g) {
            ctxR.clearRect(0,0,300,320);
            const scale = 35; const cx = 230; 
            const waterY = 40;
            const yTop = waterY + h1 * scale;

            // Water
            ctxR.fillStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1)'; ctxR.fillRect(0, waterY, 300, 320);
            ctxR.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6'; ctxR.lineWidth = 1;
            ctxR.beginPath(); ctxR.moveTo(0, waterY); ctxR.lineTo(300, waterY); ctxR.stroke();

            // Ploha
            ctxR.beginPath(); ctxR.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctxR.lineWidth = 4;
            ctxR.arc(cx, yTop, R * scale, Math.PI/2, Math.PI);
            ctxR.stroke();

            // Radial Arrows
            for(let a = 90; a <= 180; a += 15) {
                const rad = a * Math.PI / 180;
                const localZ = Math.sin(rad - Math.PI/2) * R;
                const globalZ = h1 + localZ;
                const pLen = (globalZ * 10) + 15; // visual length

                const xStart = cx + Math.cos(rad) * R * scale;
                const yStart = yTop + Math.sin(rad) * R * scale;
                const xEnd = xStart - Math.cos(rad) * pLen;
                const yEnd = yStart - Math.sin(rad) * pLen;

                drawArrow(ctxR, xEnd, yEnd, xStart, yStart, '#f59e0b', 2);
            }
        }

        function drawComp(h1, R, FH, FV) {
            ctxC.clearRect(0,0,300,320);
            const scale = 35; const cx = 230; 
            const waterY = 40;
            const yTop = waterY + h1 * scale;
            const yBot = yTop + R * scale;

            // Water
            ctxC.fillStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.05)'; ctxC.fillRect(0, waterY, 300, 320);

            // Vertikalna projekcija
            ctxC.setLineDash([5,5]); ctxC.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
            ctxC.strokeRect(cx - R*scale, yTop, 2, R*scale); ctxC.setLineDash([]);

            // Volumen tekućine (FV)
            ctxC.fillStyle = 'rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2)';
            ctxC.beginPath();
            ctxC.moveTo(cx - R*scale, waterY); ctxC.lineTo(cx, waterY); ctxC.lineTo(cx, yTop);
            ctxC.arc(cx, yTop, R*scale, Math.PI, Math.PI/2, true);
            ctxC.lineTo(cx - R*scale, yBot); ctxC.closePath(); ctxC.fill();

            // Ploha
            ctxC.beginPath(); ctxC.strokeStyle = '#1e293b'; ctxC.lineWidth = 4;
            ctxC.arc(cx, yTop, R * scale, Math.PI/2, Math.PI); ctxC.stroke();

            // FH Arrow
            drawArrow(ctxC, cx - R*scale - 70, yTop + (R/2)*scale, cx - R*scale - 5, yTop + (R/2)*scale, '#3b82f6', 3);
            // FV Arrow
            drawArrow(ctxC, cx - (R/2)*scale, waterY + 10, cx - (R/2)*scale, yTop + (R/2)*scale, '#22c55e', 3);
        }

        function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
            const headlen = 8;
            const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
            ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = width;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy); ctx.lineTo(tox, toy); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
            ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
            ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
            ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill();
        }

        h1Sl.oninput = update; rSl.oninput = update;
        update();
    })();
    </script>
</div>

```

***

### 49. Zadatak (CENGEL 3.9): Cilindar kao automatska zaklopka

**Tekst zadatka:** Čvrsti cilindar polumjera $0,8\text{ [m]}$ ovješen u točki A koristi se kao automatska zaklopka. Kada razina vode dosegne visinu $h_1$, zaklopka se otvara okretanjem oko hvatišta u točki A. Potrebno je odrediti ukupnu hidrostatsku silu koja djeluje na cilindar, liniju djelovanja (kut $\alpha$) te težinu cilindra po metru duljine ($G_c$). Zanemariti trenje.

**Zadano:**
* $h_1 = 5\text{ m}, h_2 = 4,2\text{ m}, h_3 = 0,8\text{ m}, R = 0,8\text{ m}, \rho = 1000\text{ kg/m}^3$

**Odrediti:**
* ukupnu hidrostatsku silu $F_R$
* liniju djelovanja (kut $\alpha$)
* težinu cilindra po metru duljine $G_c$

**Objašnjenje i rješenje:**

Kod zakrivljenih ploha, silu rastavljamo na horizontalnu ($F_H$) i vertikalnu ($F_V$) komponentu.

1.  **Horizontalna komponenta ($F_H$):** Ona djeluje na vertikalnu projekciju plohe (pravokutnik visine $R$ i širine $1\text{ m}$).
    *   Težište te projekcije je na dubini $z_{TAX} = h_2 + R/2 = 4,2 + 0,4 = 4,6\text{ m}$.
    *   $F_H = \rho \cdot g \cdot z_{TAX} \cdot A_x = 1000 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 4,6 \cdot 0,8 = \mathbf{36100,8\text{ N}}$.

2.  **Vertikalna komponenta ($F_V$):** Ona je jednaka težini zamišljenog stupca tekućine iznad plohe. Budući da je tekućina *ispod* plohe, sila djeluje prema gore (uzgon).
    *   Volumen se sastoji od pravokutnika iznad cilindra i volumena samog dijela cilindra.
    *   $F_V = \rho \cdot g \cdot V = \mathbf{37893\text{ N}}$.

3.  **Rezultantna sila ($F_R$) i kut ($\alpha$):**
    *   $F_R = \sqrt{F_H^2 + F_V^2} = \mathbf{52336,6\text{ N}}$.
    *   Kut djelovanja: $\alpha = \arctan(F_V / F_H) = \mathbf{46,4^\circ}$. Linija sile prolazi kroz središte cilindra jer su sve elementarne sile tlaka okomite na površinu.

4.  **Težina cilindra ($G_c$):** Da bi se vrata otvorila, moment težine mora biti jednak momentu hidrostatske sile oko točke A.
    *   $\sum M_A = 0 \implies F_R \cdot R \cdot \sin(\alpha) - G_c \cdot R = 0$.
    *   $G_c = F_R \cdot \sin(\alpha) = 52336,6 \cdot \sin(46,4^\circ) \approx \mathbf{37,9\text{ kN/m}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 49: AUTOMATSKA ZAKLOPKA (CILINDAR) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-49" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    max-width: 900px;
    margin: 30px auto;
    padding: 0;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 16px;
    background: #ffffff;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
    overflow: hidden;
">
    <!-- Header with Gradient -->
    <div style="
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a8a 0%, #3b82f6 100%);
        padding: 20px 30px;
        color: white;
    ">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700;">
            49. Automatska zaklopka (Zadatak 49)
        </h3>
        <p style="margin: 5px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.9; font-size: 0.9rem;">Analiza momenata i automatskog otvaranja cilindrične zaklopke</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Controls Section -->
        <div style="padding: 25px; background: #f8fafc; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569; font-size: 0.85rem;">RAZINA VODE (h₁)</label>
                        <span id="h1-val-49" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">5.0 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="h1-slider-49" min="1" max="7" step="0.1" value="5" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569; font-size: 0.85rem;">POLUMJER (R)</label>
                        <span id="r-val-49" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">0.8 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="r-slider-49" min="0.3" max="1.2" step="0.05" value="0.8" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569; font-size: 0.85rem;">DUBINA ZGLOBA (h₂)</label>
                        <span id="h2-val-49" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">4.2 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="h2-slider-49" min="0" max="6" step="0.1" value="4.2" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569; font-size: 0.85rem;">GUSTOĆA (ρ)</label>
                        <span id="rho-val-49" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">1000 kg/m³</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="rho-slider-49" min="800" max="1200" step="10" value="1000" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 15px; background: white; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 5px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Stanje zaklopke</div>
                    <div id="gate-status-49" style="font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1rem; color: #059669;">ZATVORENA</div>
                    <div id="moment-ratio-49" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 5px;">M_voda < M_težina</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Canvas and Results Section -->
        <div style="padding: 25px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; background: #ffffff;">
            <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 350px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <canvas id="canvas-49" width="550" height="350" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>

                <!-- Glassmorphism Overlay for Legend -->
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 15px; right: 15px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); padding: 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); font-size: 0.75rem; color: #334155; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; pointer-events: none;">
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><div style="width: 12px; height: 3px; background: #ef4444;"></div> FH (Horizontalna)</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><div style="width: 12px; height: 3px; background: #10b981;"></div> FV (Vertikalna)</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><div style="width: 12px; height: 3px; background: #f59e0b;"></div> FR (Rezultanta)</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><div style="width: 12px; height: 3px; background: #6366f1;"></div> Gc (Težina)</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px;">
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #3b82f6;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;">Komponente sile</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 8px;">
                        <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569;">F<sub>H</sub>:</span>
                        <span id="fh-49" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; font-family: monospace;">... N</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 4px;">
                        <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569;">F<sub>V</sub>:</span>
                        <span id="fv-49" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; font-family: monospace;">... N</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #f97316;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #c2410c; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;">Rezultati</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 8px;">
                        <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569;">Kut α:</span>
                        <span id="alpha-49" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; font-family: monospace;">... °</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 4px;">
                        <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569;">Težina G<sub>c</sub>:</span>
                        <span id="gc-49" style="font-weight: 700; color: #c2410c; font-family: monospace;">... kN/m</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const h1S = document.getElementById('h1-slider-49');
    const rS = document.getElementById('r-slider-49');
    const h2S = document.getElementById('h2-slider-49');
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('rho-slider-49');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-49');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    let rotationAngle = 0;
    let targetRotation = 0;

    function draw() {
        const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value);
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const h2 = parseFloat(h2S.value);
        const rho = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('h1-val-49').innerText = h1.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('r-val-49').innerText = R.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('h2-val-49').innerText = h2.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('rho-val-49').innerText = rho.toFixed(0) + ' kg/m³';

        // Physics Calculations
        // Horizontal force on vertical projection (rectangle R x 1)
        const ztax = h2 + R/2;
        const FH = rho * g * ztax * R;

        // Vertical force (upward buoyancy because water is below the quadrant)
        // Vol = rectangle above + quadrant part
        const FV = rho * g * (R * h2 + (Math.PI * R * R / 4));
        const alpha = Math.atan2(FV, FH) * 180 / Math.PI;
        const FR = Math.sqrt(FH * FH + FV * FV);

        // Moment about A (hinge)
        // Water moment: FR passes through center, so moment is FR * arm
        // Arm for FR about hinge A (if A is at top-left of the arc box)
        // Let's assume hinge A is at (0, 0) relative to the arc's top-left corner
        // Water force resultant FR passes through center (R, R)
        const MW = FR * R * Math.sin(alpha * Math.PI / 180);

        // We set Gc to be exactly at balance in the original task, 
        // but here let's assume a "standard" Gc based on initial conditions or 37.9 kN/m
        const Gc_balance = MW / R; 
        const Gc_fixed = 37900; // 37.9 kN/m

        document.getElementById('fh-49').innerText = FH.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('fv-49').innerText = FV.toFixed(0) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('alpha-49').innerText = alpha.toFixed(1) + '°';
        document.getElementById('gc-49').innerText = (Gc_balance / 1000).toFixed(1) + ' kN/m';

        const isOpen = MW > (37900 * R); // Comparing with a fixed weight for animation
        targetRotation = isOpen ? -Math.PI / 4 : 0;
        rotationAngle += (targetRotation - rotationAngle) * 0.1;

        const statusEl = document.getElementById('gate-status-49');
        const ratioEl = document.getElementById('moment-ratio-49');
        if (isOpen) {
            statusEl.innerText = 'OTVORENA';
            statusEl.style.color = '#dc2626';
            ratioEl.innerText = 'M_voda > M_težina';
        } else {
            statusEl.innerText = 'ZATVORENA';
            statusEl.style.color = '#059669';
            ratioEl.innerText = 'M_voda < M_težina';
        }

        render(h1, R, h2, FH, FV, FR, alpha, rotationAngle);
        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    function render(h1, R, h2, FH, FV, FR, alpha, rot) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const scale = 30;
        const startX = 350; // Hinge horizontal pos
        const startY = 50 + h2 * scale; // Hinge vertical pos
        const waterTop = 50;

        // Draw Water
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2)";
        ctx.fillRect(50, waterTop, startX - 50, (h1) * scale);

        // Water surface
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2563eb";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(50, waterTop);
        ctx.lineTo(startX, waterTop);
        ctx.stroke();

        // Draw Tank Floor
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(startX, startY + R * scale);
        ctx.lineTo(50, startY + R * scale);
        ctx.stroke();

        // Hinge Point A
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(startX, startY);
        ctx.rotate(rot);

        // Draw Cylinder (Solid)
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, R * scale, R * scale, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#cbd5e1";
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.stroke();

        // Mark Hinge
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, 0, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillStyle = "white";
        ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("A", -15, -5);

        // Force Gc (at center)
        drawArrow(ctx, 0, R * scale, 0, R * scale + 40, "#6366f1", 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#6366f1";
        ctx.fillText("Gc", 5, R * scale + 30);

        ctx.restore();

        // If not rotated much, show forces acting on the static surface
        if (Math.abs(rot) < 0.01) {
            // Horizontal Projection
            ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
            ctx.strokeRect(startX - R * scale, startY, 2, R * scale);
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            // Force FH
            const fhX = startX - R * scale;
            const fhY = startY + (R/2) * scale;
            drawArrow(ctx, fhX - 60, fhY, fhX - 5, fhY, "#ef4444", 3);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
            ctx.fillText("FH", fhX - 50, fhY - 10);

            // Force FV
            const fvX = startX - (R/2) * scale;
            const fvY = startY + R * scale;
            drawArrow(ctx, fvX, fvY + 40, fvX, fvY + 5, "#10b981", 3);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#10b981";
            ctx.fillText("FV", fvX + 10, fvY + 30);

            // Resultant FR
            const rad = alpha * Math.PI / 180;
            const frX = startX - R * scale * Math.cos(rad);
            const frY = startY + R * scale * (1 - Math.sin(rad));
            drawArrow(ctx, startX - R * scale - 40 * Math.cos(rad), startY + R * scale - 40 * Math.sin(rad), startX - R * scale, startY + R * scale, "#f59e0b", 2);
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.stroke();
    }

    h1S.oninput = rS.oninput = h2S.oninput = rhoS.oninput = draw;
    draw();
})();
</script>
```

***

### 50. Zadatak (2500 SPFM – 5.1): Potopljena četvrtina kruga

**Tekst zadatka:** Potopljena zakrivljena površina AB presjeka četvrtine kruga polumjera $R=1,22\text{ m}$. Duljina spremnika je $b=1,83\text{ m}$. Odrediti komponente sile i njihove položaje ($z_{FH}$ i $x_{FV}$).

**Zadano:** $h_1 = 2,44\text{ m}, b = 1,83\text{ m}, R = 1,22\text{ m}, \rho = 998\text{ kg/m}^3$.

**Objašnjenje i rješenje:**

1.  **Horizontalna sila ($F_H$):**
    *   Djeluje na pravokutnik BF ($R \times b$). Težište je na $z_{TAX} = h_1 + R/2 = 3,05\text{ m}$.
    *   $F_H = \rho \cdot g \cdot z_{TAX} \cdot (R \cdot b) = \mathbf{66667\text{ N}}$.
    *   **Položaj ($z_{FH}$):** Koristi se formula za centar tlaka: $z_{FH} = z_{TAX} + \frac{I_{x0}}{z_{TAX} \cdot A} = \mathbf{3,09\text{ m}}$.

2.  **Vertikalna sila ($F_V$):**
    *   Jednaka je težini vode iznad plohe AB. Taj volumen čine pravokutnik ($h_1 \cdot R \cdot b$) i četvrtina kruga ($\frac{R^2 \pi}{4} \cdot b$).
    *   $V = 7,587\text{ m}^3 \implies F_V = \rho \cdot g \cdot V = \mathbf{74277,6\text{ N}}$.
    *   **Položaj ($x_{FV}$):** Određuje se preko statičkog momenta volumena (zbroj momenata pojedinih dijelova kroz ukupni volumen).
    *   $x_{FV} = \mathbf{0,584 \text{ m}}$ od vertikalne osi koja prolazi kroz točku B.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 50 & 51: ČETVRTINA KRUGA - USPOREDBA LIJEVO/DESNO -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-50-51" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
    max-width: 950px;
    margin: 40px auto;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
">
    <!-- Main Header -->
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 100%); padding: 25px 35px; color: white;">
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
            <div>
                <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.025em;">
                    50. & 51. Hidrostatski tlak na četvrtinu kruga
                </h3>
                <p style="margin: 6px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 400;">Usporedba sila za vodu s lijeve (Task 50) i desne strane (Task 51)</p>
            </div>
            <!-- Side Toggle -->
            <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 5px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; gap: 5px;">
                <button id="side-left-btn" style="border: none; background: #3b82f6; color: white; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; transition: all 0.2s;">Voda Lijeve</button>
                <button id="side-right-btn" style="border: none; background: transparent; color: #94a3b8; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; transition: all 0.2s;">Voda Desno</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 340px 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Left Column: Controls -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 30px; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px;">
                
                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #334155; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Polumjer (R)</label>
                        <span id="r-val-50" style="color: #3b82f6; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;">1.22 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="r-slider-50" min="0.5" max="2.5" step="0.05" value="1.22" style="width: 100%; height: 6px; border-radius: 3px; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #334155; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Dubina (h₁)</label>
                        <span id="h1-val-50" style="color: #3b82f6; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;">2.44 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="h1-slider-50" min="0.5" max="4" step="0.05" value="2.44" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #334155; font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Širina (b)</label>
                        <span id="b-val-50" style="color: #3b82f6; font-weight: 700; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;">1.83 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="b-slider-50" min="0.5" max="3" step="0.05" value="1.83" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                </div>

                <div style="padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                    <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #475569; font-weight: 500;">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="imaginary-toggle" style="width: 18px; height: 18px; accent-color: #3b82f6;"> Prikaži zamišljeni volumen
                    </label>
                </div>

                <!-- Info Card -->
                <div style="margin-top: 10px; background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Dekompozicija volumena</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 3px; background: #93c5fd;"></div>
                        <span style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #475569;">Pravokutnik (V₁): <b id="v1-val" style="color: #1e293b;">...</b> m³</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                        <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 3px; background: #3b82f6;"></div>
                        <span style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #475569;">Četvrtina (V₂): <b id="v2-val" style="color: #1e293b;">...</b> m³</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Right Column: Visualization -->
        <div style="padding: 30px; background: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 25px;">
            <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 380px; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.02);">
                <canvas id="canvas-50" width="600" height="380" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                
                <!-- Overlay Results (Glassmorphism) -->
                <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 20px; left: 20px; right: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); padding: 15px 20px; border-radius: 16px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px;">
                    <div>
                        <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Horizontalna (F_H)</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 2px;"><span id="fh-50-val">0</span> N</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 2px;">z_FH = <span id="zfh-50-val">0</span> m</div>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">Vertikalna (F_V)</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 2px;"><span id="fv-50-val">0</span> N</div>
                        <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 2px;">x_FV = <span id="xfv-50-val">0</span> m</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f0f9ff; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #0ea5e9;">
                <p id="physics-note" style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #0369a1; line-height: 1.5;">
                    <b>Fizika:</b> Kod vode s lijeve strane (Task 50), vertikalna sila djeluje <b>prema dolje</b> (težina stvarnog stupca). Kod vode s desne strane (Task 51), vertikalna sila djeluje <b>prema gore</b> (uzgon zamišljenog volumena).
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const rS = document.getElementById('r-slider-50');
    const h1S = document.getElementById('h1-slider-50');
    const bS = document.getElementById('b-slider-50');
    const imagT = document.getElementById('imaginary-toggle');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-50');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    
    let isRight = false;
    const btnL = document.getElementById('side-left-btn');
    const btnR = document.getElementById('side-right-btn');

    btnL.onclick = () => { isRight = false; updateUI(); update(); };
    btnR.onclick = () => { isRight = true; updateUI(); update(); };

    function updateUI() {
        btnL.style.background = isRight ? 'transparent' : '#3b82f6';
        btnL.style.color = isRight ? '#94a3b8' : 'white';
        btnR.style.background = isRight ? '#3b82f6' : 'transparent';
        btnR.style.color = isRight ? 'white' : '#94a3b8';
    }

    function update() {
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value);
        const b = parseFloat(bS.value);
        const rho = 998;
        const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('r-val-50').innerText = R.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('h1-val-50').innerText = h1.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('b-val-50').innerText = b.toFixed(2) + ' m';

        // Calculations
        const ztax = h1 + R/2;
        const FH = rho * g * ztax * (R * b);
        const zfh = ztax + (Math.pow(R, 2) / (12 * ztax));

        const V1 = R * h1 * b;
        const V2 = (Math.PI * R * R / 4) * b;
        const Vtot = V1 + V2;
        const FV = rho * g * Vtot;

        // Centroid of V1 (from vertical edge) = R/2
        // Centroid of V2 (from vertical edge) = 4R/(3π)
        const xfv = (V1 * (R/2) + V2 * (4 * R / (3 * Math.PI))) / Vtot;

        document.getElementById('fh-50-val').innerText = FH.toLocaleString(undefined, {maximumFractionDigits:0});
        document.getElementById('zfh-50-val').innerText = zfh.toFixed(3);
        document.getElementById('fv-50-val').innerText = FV.toLocaleString(undefined, {maximumFractionDigits:0});
        document.getElementById('xfv-50-val').innerText = xfv.toFixed(3);
        document.getElementById('v1-val').innerText = V1.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v2-val').innerText = V2.toFixed(2);

        render(R, h1, zfh, xfv, FH, FV);
    }

    function render(R, h1, zfh, xfv, FH, FV) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const scale = 50;
        const startX = isRight ? 150 : 450;
        const startY = 320;
        const waterY = startY - (h1 + R) * scale;

        // Draw Water
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(147, 197, 253, 0.25)";
        if (isRight) {
            ctx.fillRect(startX, waterY, canvas.width - startX - 20, (h1 + R) * scale);
        } else {
            ctx.fillRect(20, waterY, startX - 20, (h1 + R) * scale);
        }

        // Draw Volumes (if imaginary or real)
        if (!isRight || imagT.checked) {
            ctx.globalAlpha = 0.6;
            // Rectangle
            ctx.fillStyle = "#93c5fd";
            ctx.fillRect(isRight ? startX : startX - R * scale, waterY, R * scale, h1 * scale);
            
            // Quarter Circle
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6";
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(startX, startY - R * scale);
            if (isRight) {
                ctx.arc(startX, startY - R * scale, R * scale, 0, Math.PI / 2);
            } else {
                ctx.arc(startX, startY - R * scale, R * scale, Math.PI / 2, Math.PI);
            }
            ctx.lineTo(startX, startY - R * scale);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        }

        // Draw Surface AB
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#0f172a";
        ctx.lineWidth = 5;
        ctx.lineCap = "round";
        if (isRight) {
            ctx.arc(startX, startY - R * scale, R * scale, 0, Math.PI / 2);
        } else {
            ctx.arc(startX, startY - R * scale, R * scale, Math.PI / 2, Math.PI);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        // Labels A and B
        ctx.fillStyle = "#0f172a";
        ctx.font = "bold 14px Inter";
        if (isRight) {
            ctx.fillText("A", startX + R * scale + 5, startY - R * scale);
            ctx.fillText("B", startX, startY + 15);
        } else {
            ctx.fillText("A", startX - R * scale - 15, startY - R * scale);
            ctx.fillText("B", startX, startY + 15);
        }

        // Line of action FH (dashed)
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        const fhY = startY - (R + h1 - zfh) * scale;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(20, fhY);
        ctx.lineTo(canvas.width - 20, fhY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        // Force Arrows
        // FH
        const fhX = isRight ? startX + 5 : startX - 5;
        drawArrow(ctx, isRight ? fhX : fhX - 80, fhY, isRight ? fhX + 80 : fhX, fhY, "#ef4444", 3);
        
        // FV
        const fvX = isRight ? startX + xfv * scale : startX - xfv * scale;
        const fvY = startY - (R/2) * scale;
        if (isRight) {
            drawArrow(ctx, fvX, fvY + 40, fvX, fvY, "#10b981", 3); // UP
        } else {
            drawArrow(ctx, fvX, fvY - 40, fvX, fvY, "#10b981", 3); // DOWN
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.fill();
    }

    rS.oninput = h1S.oninput = bS.oninput = imagT.onchange = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```

***


### Zadatak 51. Potopljena četvrtina kruga (voda s desne strane)

(Rješenje i analiza su integrirani u gornji interaktivni widget radi lakše usporedbe.)

***

### Zadatak 52. Potopljena zaklopka (šestina isječka kruga)

**Tekst zadatka:** Potrebno je odrediti intenzitet i lokaciju horizontalne i vertikalne komponente rezultirajuće sile na zaklopku AB koja tvori šestinu kružnog isječka ($\alpha = 60^\circ$).

**Zadano:** $R = 6 \text{ m}$, $b = 10 \text{ m}$, $\rho = 998 \text{ kg/m}^3$, $\alpha = 60^\circ$.

**Objašnjenje i rješenje:**

1.  **Horizontalna komponenta ($F_H$):**
    *   Vertikalna projekcija plohe je pravokutnik visine $R \cdot \sin(\alpha)$.
    *   Dubina težišta projekcije (uz pretpostavku da je površina na razini točke B): $z_{TAX} = \frac{R \cdot \sin(60^\circ)}{2} = 2,598 \text{ m}$.
    *   **Iznos sile:** $F_H = \rho \cdot g \cdot z_{TAX} \cdot A_x = 998 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 2,598 \cdot (10 \cdot 6 \cdot \sin 60^\circ) = \mathbf{1322 \text{ kN}}$.
    *   **Položaj ($z_{FH}$):** Nalazi se na $1/3$ visine projekcije od dna: $z_{FH} = \mathbf{1,732 \text{ m}}$.

2.  **Vertikalna komponenta ($F_V$):**
    *   Određuje se preko volumena tekućine iznad zakrivljene plohe AB.
    *   Izračunom površine segmenta iznad krivulje dobiva se volumen $V_{ABC} = 45,331 \text{ m}^3$.
    *   **Iznos sile:** $F_V = \rho \cdot g \cdot V_{ABC} = \mathbf{443810 \text{ N}}$.
    *   **Položaj ($x_{FV}$):** Izračunom statičkog momenta površine dobiva se krak $x_{FV} = \mathbf{0,842 \text{ m}}$.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 52: KRUŽNI ISJEČAK (UNAPRIJEĐENI) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-52" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    max-width: 950px;
    margin: 40px auto;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
">
    <!-- Header -->
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b 0%, #334155 100%); padding: 25px 35px; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.025em;">
            52. Hidrostatska sila na kružni isječak
        </h3>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.95rem;">Analiza sila na zakrivljenu zaklopku AB (60° isječak)</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 340px 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Controls -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 30px; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
                
                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Polumjer (R)</label>
                        <span id="r-val-52" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">6.0 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="r-slider-52" min="2" max="10" step="0.1" value="6" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Kut (α)</label>
                        <span id="alpha-val-52" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">60°</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="alpha-slider-52" min="30" max="90" step="1" value="60" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Duljina (b)</label>
                        <span id="b-val-52" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">10 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="b-slider-52" min="5" max="20" step="1" value="10" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Gustoća (ρ)</label>
                        <span id="rho-val-52" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">1000 kg/m³</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="rho-slider-52" min="800" max="1200" step="10" value="1000" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div style="padding-top: 15px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;">
                    <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569; cursor: pointer;">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="show-rect-52" checked style="accent-color: #fbbf24;"> Pravokutnik ACBD
                    </label>
                    <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569; cursor: pointer;">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="show-tri-52" checked style="accent-color: #f87171;"> Trokut DBO
                    </label>
                    <label style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #475569; cursor: pointer;">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="show-sec-52" checked style="accent-color: #60a5fa;"> Isječak ABO
                    </label>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Visualization -->
        <div style="padding: 30px; background: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 400px; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; overflow: hidden;">
                <canvas id="canvas-52" width="600" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                
                <!-- Formulas/Labels Overlay -->
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 0.75rem;">
                    <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;">Centroid isječka</div>
                    <div style="font-family: serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.9rem;">OT = (2R/π) · cos(α/2)</div>
                    <div style="margin-top: 10px; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.4;">*Prikazana formula prema<br>zahtjevu zadatka.</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Results Grid -->
            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 15px;">
                <div style="background: #f0f9ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-bottom: 3px solid #0ea5e9;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; color: #0369a1; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">FH (Horizontalna)</div>
                    <div id="fh-res-52" style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0c4a6e; margin-top: 4px;">0 kN</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 2px;">z_FH = <span id="zfh-res-52">0</span> m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-bottom: 3px solid #22c55e;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; color: #15803d; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">FV (Vertikalna)</div>
                    <div id="fv-res-52" style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #064e3b; margin-top: 4px;">0 kN</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 2px;">x_FV = <span id="xfv-res-52">0</span> m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-bottom: 3px solid #f97316;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; color: #c2410c; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Volumen (V)</div>
                    <div id="v-res-52" style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #7c2d12; margin-top: 4px;">0 m³</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 2px;">Area = <span id="a-res-52">0</span> m²</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const rS = document.getElementById('r-slider-52');
    const aS = document.getElementById('alpha-slider-52');
    const bS = document.getElementById('b-slider-52');
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('rho-slider-52');
    
    const showRect = document.getElementById('show-rect-52');
    const showTri = document.getElementById('show-tri-52');
    const showSec = document.getElementById('show-sec-52');

    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-52');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    function update() {
        const R = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const alphaDeg = parseFloat(aS.value);
        const b = parseFloat(bS.value);
        const rho = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const g = 9.81;
        const alpha = alphaDeg * Math.PI / 180;

        document.getElementById('r-val-52').innerText = R.toFixed(1) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('alpha-val-52').innerText = alphaDeg + '°';
        document.getElementById('b-val-52').innerText = b + ' m';
        document.getElementById('rho-val-52').innerText = rho + ' kg/m³';

        // Physics
        const h_proj = R * Math.sin(alpha);
        const ztax = h_proj / 2;
        const FH = (rho * g * ztax * (h_proj * b)) / 1000;
        const zfh = (2/3) * h_proj; // from top of projection

        // Volumes based on prompt's decomposition logic
        const area_rect = R * Math.sin(alpha) * (R - R * Math.cos(alpha));
        const area_tri = 0.5 * R * (R * Math.sin(alpha));
        const area_sec = 0.5 * R * R * alpha;
        const area_tot = area_rect + area_tri - area_sec;
        const Vtot = area_tot * b;
        const FV = (rho * g * Vtot) / 1000;

        const x_rect = (R - R*Math.cos(alpha)) / 2;
        const x_tri = (R - R*Math.cos(alpha)) + (R/3); 
        const x_fv = (area_rect * x_rect + area_tri * x_tri - area_sec * (R * Math.cos(alpha/2) * (2/3 * Math.sin(alpha/2) / (alpha/2)))) / area_tot;

        document.getElementById('fh-res-52').innerText = FH.toFixed(0) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('zfh-res-52').innerText = (h_proj/3).toFixed(2); 
        document.getElementById('fv-res-52').innerText = FV.toFixed(0) + ' kN';
        document.getElementById('xfv-res-52').innerText = Math.abs(x_fv).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v-res-52').innerText = Vtot.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('a-res-52').innerText = area_tot.toFixed(2);

        render(R, alpha, h_proj, FH, FV, area_rect, area_tri, area_sec);
    }

    function render(R, alpha, h_proj, FH, FV, aR, aT, aS) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        const scale = 300 / 12; 
        const startX = 450;
        const startY = 350;

        const xO = startX;
        const yO = startY;
        const xB = xO - R * scale;
        const yB = yO;
        const xA = xO - R * Math.cos(alpha) * scale;
        const yA = yO - R * Math.sin(alpha) * scale;
        const xD = xB;
        const yD = yA;
        const xC = xA;
        const yC = yB;

        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1)";
        ctx.fillRect(50, yA, startX - 50, h_proj * scale);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2563eb";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(50, yA); ctx.lineTo(startX, yA); ctx.stroke();

        if (showRect.checked) {
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.3)";
            ctx.fillRect(xB, yD, xA - xB, yC - yD);
        }
        if (showTri.checked) {
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3)";
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(xO, yO); ctx.lineTo(xB, yB); ctx.lineTo(xD, yD); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        }
        if (showSec.checked) {
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.4)";
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(xO, yO); ctx.lineTo(xB, yB);
            ctx.arc(xO, yO, R * scale, Math.PI, Math.PI + alpha);
            ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        }

        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#1e293b";
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.arc(xO, yO, R * scale, Math.PI, Math.PI + alpha);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b";
        ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("A", xA - 15, yA - 5);
        ctx.fillText("B", xB - 15, yB + 15);
        ctx.fillText("O", xO + 5, yO + 15);

        const fhY = yB - (h_proj/3) * scale;
        drawArrow(ctx, xB - 80, fhY, xB - 5, fhY, "#0ea5e9", 3);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#0369a1"; ctx.fillText("FH", xB - 70, fhY - 10);

        const fvX = xB + (R/3) * scale; 
        drawArrow(ctx, fvX, yA + 10, fvX, yB - 20, "#22c55e", 3);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#15803d"; ctx.fillText("FV", fvX + 10, yA + 30);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(xB + (R/4)*scale, yB - (h_proj/2)*scale, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillText("T", xB + (R/4)*scale + 8, yB - (h_proj/2)*scale);
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy); ctx.lineTo(tox, toy); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill();
    }

    [rS, aS, bS, rhoS].forEach(el => el.oninput = update);
    [showRect, showTri, showSec].forEach(el => el.onchange = update);
    update();
})();
</script>
```
```

***

### Zadatak 53. Elastični balon i promjena sile u užetu

**Tekst zadatka:** Elastični balon promjera $30 \text{ cm}$ napunjen je zrakom i privezan za dno. Ako se tlak zraka u spremniku poveća sa $100 \text{ kPa}$ na $1,6 \text{ MPa}$, odrediti postotak promjene sile u užetu.

**Zadano:** $D_1 = 0,3 \text{ m}$, $p_1 = 0,1 \text{ MPa}$, $p_2 = 1,6 \text{ MPa}$, $\rho = 1000 \text{ kg/m}^3$, odnos $p = C \cdot D^{-2}$.

**Objašnjenje i rješenje:**

1.  **Promjena promjera balona:**
    *   Iz ovisnosti $p \cdot D^2 = konst.$ slijedi: $D_2 = D_1 \cdot \sqrt{p_1 / p_2} = 0,3 \cdot \sqrt{0,1 / 1,6} = \mathbf{0,075 \text{ m}}$.
    *   Povećanje vanjskog tlaka drastično stisne balon.

2.  **Uzgonska sila ($F_U$):**
    *   Početna: $F_{U,1} = \rho \cdot g \cdot \frac{D_1^3 \pi}{6} = \mathbf{138,7 \text{ N}}$.
    *   Konačna: $F_{U,2} = \rho \cdot g \cdot \frac{D_2^3 \pi}{6} = \mathbf{2,17 \text{ N}}$.

3.  **Promjena sile u užetu:**
    *   Budući da je težina balona zanemariva, sila u užetu jednaka je uzgonu.
    *   Postotna promjena: $\Delta F_U = \frac{138,7 - 2,17}{138,7} \cdot 100 = \mathbf{98,4 \%}$.
    *   **Zaključak:** Sila u užetu se smanjila za 98,4% jer je balon zbog stlačivanja izgubio većinu svog volumena, a time i uzgona.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 53: ELASTIČNI BALON (UNAPRIJEĐENI) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-53" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    max-width: 950px;
    margin: 40px auto;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
">
    <!-- Header -->
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0369a1 0%, #0ea5e9 100%); padding: 25px 35px; color: white;">
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
            <div>
                <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.025em;">
                    53. Elastični balon i promjena tlaka
                </h3>
                <p style="margin: 6px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.8; font-size: 0.95rem;">Analiza uzgona pri promjeni vanjskog tlaka</p>
            </div>
            <button id="play-btn-53" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: white; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: all 0.2s;">
                ▶ Povećaj tlak
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 340px 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Controls -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 30px; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px;">
                
                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Površinski tlak (p₁)</label>
                        <span id="p1-val-53" style="color: #0369a1; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">100 kPa</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="p1-slider-53" min="100" max="1600" step="10" value="100" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #0369a1;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Početni promjer (D₁)</label>
                        <span id="d1-val-53" style="color: #0369a1; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">0.3 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="d1-slider-53" min="0.1" max="0.5" step="0.01" value="0.3" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #0369a1;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Dubina vode (h₁)</label>
                        <span id="h1-val-53" style="color: #0369a1; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">0.5 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="h1-slider-53" min="0.2" max="1.0" step="0.05" value="0.5" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #0369a1;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Gustoća (ρ)</label>
                        <span id="rho-val-53" style="color: #0369a1; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">1000 kg/m³</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="rho-slider-53" min="800" max="1200" step="10" value="1000" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #0369a1;">
                </div>

                <!-- Live Metrics Card -->
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 15px;">Live podaci</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px;">
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                            <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #64748b;">Trenutni D:</span>
                            <span id="d-curr-53" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">0.300 m</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                            <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #64748b;">Uzgon F_LB:</span>
                            <span id="flb-res-53" style="font-weight: 700; color: #0369a1;">0.0 N</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px dashed #e2e8f0;">
                            <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #64748b;">Promjena ΔF_U:</span>
                            <span id="delta-fu-53" style="font-weight: 700; color: #ef4444;">0.0 %</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Visualization & Graph -->
        <div style="padding: 30px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 25px;">
            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px;">
                <!-- Tank View -->
                <div style="position: relative; height: 320px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; overflow: hidden;">
                    <canvas id="canvas-tank-53" width="280" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                    <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase;">Prikaz spremnika</div>
                </div>
                <!-- Graph View -->
                <div style="position: relative; height: 320px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; overflow: hidden;">
                    <canvas id="canvas-graph-53" width="280" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                    <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #94a3b8; text-transform: uppercase;">F_LB ∝ 1/p^(3/2)</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #f97316;">
                <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #9a3412; line-height: 1.5;">
                    <b>Fizika:</b> Povećanjem tlaka <i>p</i>, promjer balona se smanjuje (D ∝ 1/√p). Budući da uzgon ovisi o volumenu (D³), sila uzgona pada s potencijom 3/2 tlaka.
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const p1S = document.getElementById('p1-slider-53');
    const d1S = document.getElementById('d1-slider-53');
    const h1S = document.getElementById('h1-slider-53');
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('rho-slider-53');
    const playBtn = document.getElementById('play-btn-53');

    const cTank = document.getElementById('canvas-tank-53');
    const cGraph = document.getElementById('canvas-graph-53');
    const ctxT = cTank.getContext('2d');
    const ctxG = cGraph.getContext('2d');

    let initialFLB = null;
    let isPlaying = false;

    function update() {
        const p_curr = parseFloat(p1S.value);
        const p_init = 100; 
        const D1 = parseFloat(d1S.value);
        const h1 = parseFloat(h1S.value);
        const rho = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('p1-val-53').innerText = p_curr + ' kPa';
        document.getElementById('d1-val-53').innerText = D1.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('h1-val-53').innerText = h1.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('rho-val-53').innerText = rho + ' kg/m³';

        const D_curr = D1 * Math.sqrt(p_init / p_curr);
        const Vol = (Math.PI * Math.pow(D_curr, 3)) / 6;
        const FLB = rho * g * Vol;

        if (p_curr === 100 || initialFLB === null) initialFLB = FLB;
        const delta = ((initialFLB - FLB) / initialFLB) * 100;

        document.getElementById('d-curr-53').innerText = D_curr.toFixed(3) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('flb-res-53').innerText = FLB.toFixed(1) + ' N';
        document.getElementById('delta-fu-53').innerText = delta.toFixed(1) + ' %';

        renderTank(D_curr, h1);
        renderGraph(p_curr, FLB, D1, rho, g);
    }

    function renderTank(D, h) {
        ctxT.clearRect(0, 0, cTank.width, cTank.height);
        const scale = 200; 
        const groundY = 280;
        const waterTopY = groundY - h * scale;
        
        ctxT.fillStyle = "#f1f5f9";
        ctxT.fillRect(40, 40, 200, groundY - 40);

        ctxT.fillStyle = "rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.3)";
        ctxT.fillRect(40, waterTopY, 200, groundY - waterTopY);
        
        const balloonY = waterTopY + (h/2) * scale;
        ctxT.strokeStyle = "#475569";
        ctxT.lineWidth = 2;
        ctxT.beginPath();
        ctxT.moveTo(140, groundY);
        ctxT.lineTo(140, balloonY + (D/2)*scale);
        ctxT.stroke();

        ctxT.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
        ctxT.beginPath();
        ctxT.arc(140, balloonY, (D/2) * scale, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctxT.fill();
        ctxT.strokeStyle = "#dc2626";
        ctxT.lineWidth = 2;
        ctxT.stroke();

        drawArrow(ctxT, 140, balloonY - (D/2)*scale, 140, balloonY - (D/2)*scale - 40, "#0369a1", 3); 
        drawArrow(ctxT, 140, balloonY + (D/2)*scale + 10, 140, balloonY + (D/2)*scale + 50, "#ef4444", 2); 
        
        ctxT.fillStyle = "#0369a1"; ctxT.font = "bold 10px Inter"; ctxT.fillText("F_LB", 150, balloonY - (D/2)*scale - 20);
        ctxT.fillStyle = "#ef4444"; ctxT.fillText("F_U", 150, balloonY + (D/2)*scale + 40);
    }

    function renderGraph(p_curr, flb_curr, D1, rho, g) {
        ctxG.clearRect(0, 0, cGraph.width, cGraph.height);
        const padding = 40;
        const w = cGraph.width - 2 * padding;
        const h = cGraph.height - 2 * padding;

        ctxG.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctxG.lineWidth = 1;
        ctxG.beginPath();
        ctxG.moveTo(padding, padding);
        ctxG.lineTo(padding, padding + h);
        ctxG.lineTo(padding + w, padding + h);
        ctxG.stroke();

        ctxG.beginPath();
        ctxG.strokeStyle = "#e2e8f0";
        for (let p = 100; p <= 1600; p += 10) {
            const d = D1 * Math.sqrt(100 / p);
            const v = (Math.PI * Math.pow(d, 3)) / 6;
            const f = rho * g * v;
            
            const px = padding + ((p - 100) / 1500) * w;
            const py = padding + h - (f / initialFLB) * h;
            if (p === 100) ctxG.moveTo(px, py);
            else ctxG.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctxG.stroke();

        const curX = padding + ((p_curr - 100) / 1500) * w;
        const curY = padding + h - (flb_curr / initialFLB) * h;
        ctxG.fillStyle = "#0369a1";
        ctxG.beginPath(); ctxG.arc(curX, curY, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctxG.fill();
        
        ctxG.fillStyle = "#64748b"; ctxG.font = "10px Inter";
        ctxG.fillText("p [kPa]", padding + w - 30, padding + h + 15);
        ctxG.save();
        ctxG.translate(padding - 10, padding + 30);
        ctxG.rotate(-Math.PI/2);
        ctxG.fillText("Uzgon [N]", 0, 0);
        ctxG.restore();
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy); ctx.lineTo(tox, toy); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill();
    }

    playBtn.onclick = () => {
        if (isPlaying) return;
        isPlaying = true;
        let p = 100;
        const interval = setInterval(() => {
            p += 20;
            if (p > 1600) p = 1600;
            p1S.value = p;
            update();
            if (p >= 1600) {
                clearInterval(interval);
                isPlaying = false;
            }
        }, 30);
    };

    [p1S, d1S, h1S, rhoS].forEach(el => el.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>

```

***

### Zadatak 54. Ledenjak (volumni udio i stabilnost)

**Tekst zadatka:** Potrebno je odrediti volumni udio ledenjaka koji je potopljen u morskoj vodi te objasniti zašto dolazi do prevrtanja ledenjaka.

**Zadano:** $\rho_L = 917 \text{ kg/m}^3$, $\rho_{mv} = 1042 \text{ kg/m}^3$.

**Objašnjenje i rješenje:**

1.  **Uvjet ravnoteže (Plutanje):**
    *   Težina ledenjaka ($G$) mora biti jednaka sili uzgona ($F_L$): $G = F_L$.
    *   $\rho_L \cdot g \cdot V_{ukupno} = \rho_{mv} \cdot g \cdot V_{potopljeno}$.

2.  **Izračun volumnog udjela:**
    *   $\frac{V_{potopljeno}}{V_{ukupno}} = \frac{\rho_L}{\rho_{mv}} = \frac{917}{1042} = \mathbf{0,88}$ (ili **88%**).
    *   **Zaključak:** Čak 88% volumena ledenjaka nalazi se ispod površine mora.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 54: LEDENJAK (UNAPRIJEĐENI) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-54" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    max-width: 950px;
    margin: 40px auto;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
">
    <!-- Header -->
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #334155 100%); padding: 25px 35px; color: white;">
        <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.025em;">
            54. Uzgon i stabilnost ledenjaka
        </h3>
        <p style="margin: 6px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.95rem;">Analiza volumnog udjela i statičke stabilnosti plutanja</p>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 340px 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Controls -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 30px; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
                
                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Gustoća leda (ρ_ice)</label>
                        <span id="rho-ice-val-54" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">917 kg/m³</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="rho-ice-slider-54" min="850" max="950" step="1" value="917" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Gustoća mora (ρ_sea)</label>
                        <span id="rho-sea-val-54" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">1025 kg/m³</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="rho-sea-slider-54" min="1000" max="1100" step="1" value="1025" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Asimetrija topljenja</label>
                        <span id="asym-val-54" style="color: #ef4444; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">0%</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="asym-slider-54" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ef4444;">
                </div>

                <!-- Stability Status Card -->
                <div id="stability-card-54" style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 20px; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; background: #ffffff; transition: all 0.3s ease;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;">Status stabilnosti</div>
                    <div id="stability-status-54" style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #10b981;">STABILNO</div>
                    <div id="stability-desc-54" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 4px;">Momenti su u ravnoteži.</div>
                </div>

                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1e40af; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 5px;">Potopljeni volumen</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e3a8a;"><span id="sub-percent-54">89.5</span>%</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Visualization -->
        <div style="padding: 30px; background: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 400px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; overflow: hidden;">
                <canvas id="canvas-54" width="600" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                
                <!-- Equations Overlay -->
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 20px; left: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #1e293b;">
                    <div style="margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 700; color: #3b82f6;">G = F<sub>L</sub></div>
                    <div>ρ<sub>L</sub>·V<sub>L</sub> = ρ<sub>mv</sub>·V<sub>um</sub></div>
                    <div style="margin-top: 5px; opacity: 0.8; font-size: 0.75rem;">
                        <span id="rho-ice-eq-54">917</span> · V = <span id="rho-sea-eq-54">1025</span> · V<sub>um</sub>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Legend -->
                <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;">
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;">
                        <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ef4444;"></div> Težište (G)
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;">
                        <div style="width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; background: #3b82f6;"></div> Centar uzgona (F<sub>L</sub>)
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
