```{=html}
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #fdf2f2; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #ef4444;">
                <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #991b1b; line-height: 1.5;">
                    <b>Fizikalno objašnjenje:</b> Nejednoliko topljenje uzrokuje pomak centra mase i centra uzgona. Kada ove dvije sile više nisu na istom vertikalnom pravcu, stvara se <b>moment para sila</b> koji uzrokuje prevrtanje ledenjaka (tipping) dok se ne postigne novi stabilni položaj.
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const iceS = document.getElementById('rho-ice-slider-54');
    const seaS = document.getElementById('rho-sea-slider-54');
    const asymS = document.getElementById('asym-slider-54');
    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-54');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    let currentRotation = 0;
    let targetRotation = 0;

    function update() {
        const rhoI = parseFloat(iceS.value);
        const rhoS = parseFloat(seaS.value);
        const asym = parseFloat(asymS.value) / 100;

        document.getElementById('rho-ice-val-54').innerText = rhoI + ' kg/m³';
        document.getElementById('rho-sea-val-54').innerText = rhoS + ' kg/m³';
        document.getElementById('asym-val-54').innerText = (asym * 100).toFixed(0) + '%';
        
        document.getElementById('rho-ice-eq-54').innerText = rhoI;
        document.getElementById('rho-sea-eq-54').innerText = rhoS;

        const ratio = (rhoI / rhoS);
        document.getElementById('sub-percent-54').innerText = (ratio * 100).toFixed(1);

        const card = document.getElementById('stability-card-54');
        const status = document.getElementById('stability-status-54');
        const desc = document.getElementById('stability-desc-54');

        if (asym > 0.05) {
            status.innerText = 'PREVRTANJE...';
            status.style.color = '#ef4444';
            desc.innerText = 'Asimetrija stvara destabilizirajući moment.';
            card.style.borderColor = '#fecaca';
            card.style.background = '#fef2f2';
            targetRotation = asym * Math.PI / 4; 
        } else {
            status.innerText = 'STABILNO';
            status.style.color = '#10b981';
            desc.innerText = 'Momenti su u ravnoteži.';
            card.style.borderColor = '#e2e8f0';
            card.style.background = '#ffffff';
            targetRotation = 0;
        }

        animate();
    }

    function animate() {
        currentRotation += (targetRotation - currentRotation) * 0.05;
        draw();
        if (Math.abs(targetRotation - currentRotation) > 0.001) {
            requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }
    }

    function draw() {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        
        const rhoI = parseFloat(iceS.value);
        const rhoS = parseFloat(seaS.value);
        const asym = parseFloat(asymS.value) / 100;
        const ratio = rhoI / rhoS;

        const waterY = 150;
        const centerX = 300;
        const baseW = 160;
        const baseH = 220;

        // Sea
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ebf5fb";
        ctx.fillRect(0, waterY, canvas.width, canvas.height - waterY);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3498db";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, waterY); ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, waterY); ctx.stroke();

        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(centerX, waterY);
        ctx.rotate(currentRotation);

        // Calculate offset from ratio
        const submergedH = baseH * ratio;
        const topY = -(baseH - submergedH);
        
        // Draw Iceberg Shape (Asymmetric)
        const leftAsym = 1 - asym * 0.5;
        const rightAsym = 1 + asym * 0.5;

        // Above water part
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-baseW/2 * leftAsym, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(-baseW/3, topY);
        ctx.lineTo(baseW/3, topY);
        ctx.lineTo(baseW/2 * rightAsym, 0);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#d1d5db";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.stroke();

        // Submerged part
        ctx.fillStyle = "#3498db";
        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.8;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-baseW/2 * leftAsym, 0);
        ctx.lineTo(-baseW/2 * leftAsym * 0.8, submergedH);
        ctx.lineTo(baseW/2 * rightAsym * 0.8, submergedH);
        ctx.lineTo(baseW/2 * rightAsym, 0);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2980b9";
        ctx.stroke();

        // Centers and Arrows
        const gX = asym * 20;
        const gY = (submergedH + topY) / 2;
        const bX = -asym * 10;
        const bY = submergedH / 2;

        // Gravity G
        drawArrow(ctx, gX, gY, gX, gY + 60, "#ef4444", 3);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(gX, gY, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter"; ctx.fillText("G", gX + 10, gY + 5);

        // Buoyancy FL
        drawArrow(ctx, bX, bY + 40, bX, bY - 20, "#3b82f6", 3);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(bX, bY, 5, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillText("FL", bX + 10, bY + 5);

        ctx.restore();
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy); ctx.lineTo(tox, toy); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill();
    }

    [iceS, seaS, asymS].forEach(el => el.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>
```


3.  **Fizikalni uzrok prevrtanja:**
...
    *   Ledenjak se ne topi jednoliko (temperatura mora varira po dubini, morske struje).
    *   Nejednoliko topljenje mijenja geometriju ledenjaka, što uzrokuje **pomak centra mase** i **centra uzgona**. Kada se naruši statička stabilnost (moment para sila postane destabilizirajući), ledenjak se okreće kako bi pronašao novi stabilni položaj.
    
***

### 55. Zadatak (CENGEL 3.151): Potopljeni naopaki cilindar

**Tekst zadatka:** Cilindrični spremnik težine $G=79\text{ [N]}$ djelomično je potopljen. Potrebno je odrediti visinu stupca u manometru ($h_1$) i silu $F$ potrebnu da spremnik ostane u tom položaju.

**Zadano:** $G = 79\text{ N}, h_2 = 0,2\text{ m}, D = 0,3\text{ m}, \rho_v = 1000\text{ kg/m}^3, \bar{\rho}_{mf} = 2,1$.

**Objašnjenje i rješenje:**

1.  **Tlak u cilindru ($p_m$):**
    Budući da je razina vode u cilindru niža za $h_2$ od razine vani, unutar cilindra vlada pretlak koji drži tu razinu.
    *   $p_m = \rho_v \cdot g \cdot h_2 = 1000 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 0,2 = \mathbf{1962\text{ Pa}}$.

2.  **Visina manometra ($h_1$):**
    Taj isti pretlak $p_m$ djeluje na manometar s fluidom gustoće $\rho_{mf} = 2,1 \cdot 1000 = 2100\text{ kg/m}^3$.
    *   $p_m = \rho_{mf} \cdot g \cdot h_1 \implies h_1 = \frac{1962}{2100 \cdot 9,81} = \mathbf{0,095\text{ m}}$.

3.  **Sila zadržavanja ($F$):**
    Postavljamo ravnotežu sila u vertikalnom smjeru. Na spremnik djeluje vanjska sila $F$ prema dolje, težina $G$ prema dolje, a tlak zraka $p_m$ gura odozdo prema gore na gornju bazu cilindra (površina $A_c$).
    *   $F + G = p_m \cdot A_c$
    *   $F = p_m \cdot \frac{D^2 \pi}{4} - G = 1962 \cdot \frac{0,3^2 \pi}{4} - 79 = \mathbf{59,7\text{ N}}$.

**Zaključak:** Sila $F$ je pozitivna, što znači da moramo pritiskati spremnik prema dolje kako bi on ostao potopljen na toj dubini, jer ga tlak zarobljenog zraka "gura" van poput plovka.

```{=html}
<!-- ZADATAK 55: OBRNUTI CILINDAR S MANOMETROM (UNAPRIJEĐENI) -->
<div class="widget-container" id="widget-55" style="
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    max-width: 950px;
    margin: 40px auto;
    background: #ffffff;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
">
    <!-- Header -->
    <div style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b 0%, #334155 100%); padding: 25px 35px; color: white;">
        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
            <div>
                <h3 style="margin: 0; color: white; border: none; background: none; padding: 0; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.025em;">
                    55. Obrnuti cilindrični spremnik
                </h3>
                <p style="margin: 6px 0 0 0; opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.95rem;">Analiza tlaka zarobljenog zraka i manometrije</p>
            </div>
            <button id="push-btn-55" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); color: white; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: all 0.2s;">
                ↓ Potisni dublje
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 340px 1fr; gap: 0;">
        <!-- Controls -->
        <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 30px; border-right: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
                
                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Težina (G)</label>
                        <span id="g-val-55" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">79 N</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="g-slider-55" min="20" max="150" step="1" value="79" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Promjer (D)</label>
                        <span id="d-val-55" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">0.3 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="d-slider-55" min="0.1" max="0.5" step="0.01" value="0.3" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Dubina (h₂)</label>
                        <span id="h2-val-55" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">0.2 m</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="h2-slider-55" min="0.05" max="0.4" step="0.01" value="0.2" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <div class="control-group">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <label style="font-weight: 700; color: #475569; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase;">Rel. gustoća (ρ_mf)</label>
                        <span id="rhomf-val-55" style="color: #2563eb; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">2.1</span>
                    </div>
                    <input type="range" id="rhomf-slider-55" min="1.5" max="3.0" step="0.1" value="2.1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #2563eb;">
                </div>

                <!-- Metrics -->
                <div style="margin-top: 10px; padding: 20px; background: white; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Proračun manometra</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #64748b;">Pretlak p<sub>air</sub>:</span>
                        <span id="pm-res-55" style="font-weight: 700; color: #1e293b;">... Pa</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                        <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #64748b;">Visina h<sub>1</sub>:</span>
                        <span id="h1-res-55" style="font-weight: 700; color: #f97316;">... m</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px dashed #e2e8f0;">
                        <span style="font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b;">Potrebna sila F:</span>
                        <span id="f-res-55" style="font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444;">... N</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Visualization -->
        <div style="padding: 30px; background: white; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 420px; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #f1f5f9; overflow: hidden;">
                <canvas id="canvas-55" width="600" height="420" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
                
                <!-- Equations Overlay -->
                <div style="position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 0.75rem; color: #334155;">
                    <div style="font-weight: 800; color: #64748b; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;">Ravnoteža sila</div>
                    <div style="font-family: serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.95rem;">F + G = p<sub>air</sub> · A<sub>c</sub></div>
                    <div style="margin-top: 10px; font-family: serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.95rem;">h<sub>1</sub> = (ρ<sub>v</sub> / ρ<sub>mf</sub>) · h<sub>2</sub></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 15px; background: #fff7ed; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #f97316;">
                <p style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #9a3412; line-height: 1.4;">
                    <b>Napomena:</b> Sila F je potrebna jer tlak zraka u unutrašnjosti "gura" gornju stijenku cilindra prema gore jače nego što je težina cilindra prema dolje.
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const gS = document.getElementById('g-slider-55');
    const dS = document.getElementById('d-slider-55');
    const h2S = document.getElementById('h2-slider-55');
    const rmS = document.getElementById('rhomf-slider-55');
    const pushBtn = document.getElementById('push-btn-55');

    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas-55');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

    let isAnimating = false;

    function update() {
        const G = parseFloat(gS.value);
        const D = parseFloat(dS.value);
        const h2 = parseFloat(h2S.value);
        const rho_mf_rel = parseFloat(rmS.value);
        const rho_v = 1000;
        const g = 9.81;

        document.getElementById('g-val-55').innerText = G + ' N';
        document.getElementById('d-val-55').innerText = D.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('h2-val-55').innerText = h2.toFixed(2) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('rhomf-val-55').innerText = rho_mf_rel.toFixed(1);

        // Physics
        const pm = rho_v * g * h2;
        const h1 = pm / (rho_mf_rel * rho_v * g);
        const Ac = (Math.PI * D * D) / 4;
        const F = pm * Ac - G;

        document.getElementById('pm-res-55').innerText = pm.toFixed(0) + ' Pa';
        document.getElementById('h1-res-55').innerText = h1.toFixed(3) + ' m';
        document.getElementById('f-res-55').innerText = F.toFixed(1) + ' N';

        render(G, D, h2, h1, F, pm);
    }

    function render(G, D, h2, h1, F, pm) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        
        const scale = 500; 
        const centerX = 220;
        const waterY = 100;
        
        // Water tank
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ebf5fb";
        ctx.fillRect(50, waterY, 350, 300);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3498db";
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(50, waterY); ctx.lineTo(400, waterY); ctx.stroke();

        // Cylinder
        const cylW = D * scale;
        const cylH = 150;
        const cylTopY = waterY + 50 - (h2*scale)/4; // Simplified movement
        const airLevelY = waterY + h2 * scale;

        // Container Walls
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.strokeRect(centerX - cylW/2, cylTopY, cylW, cylH);
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.2)";
        ctx.fillRect(centerX - cylW/2, cylTopY, cylW, airLevelY - cylTopY);

        // Manometer Connection
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(centerX + cylW/2, cylTopY + 20);
        ctx.lineTo(450, cylTopY + 20);
        ctx.lineTo(450, 250);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.lineWidth = 8;
        ctx.stroke();

        // U-Tube Manometer
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(450, 250);
        ctx.lineTo(450, 350);
        ctx.arc(480, 350, 30, Math.PI, 0, true);
        ctx.lineTo(510, 200);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 12;
        ctx.stroke();

        // Manometer Fluid (Orange)
        const mBaseY = 350;
        const mLeftLevel = mBaseY - 30; // arbitrary base
        const mRightLevel = mLeftLevel - h1 * scale;

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#f97316";
        ctx.lineWidth = 8;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(450, 250 + (250-mLeftLevel)); // Fill from top connection down
        ctx.lineTo(450, 350);
        ctx.arc(480, 350, 30, Math.PI, 0, true);
        ctx.lineTo(510, mRightLevel);
        ctx.stroke();

        // Force Arrows
        // Weight G
        drawArrow(ctx, centerX - 20, cylTopY + 30, centerX - 20, cylTopY + 80, "#2563eb", 3);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#2563eb"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter"; ctx.fillText("G", centerX - 35, cylTopY + 60);

        // Force F
        if (F > 0) {
            drawArrow(ctx, centerX + 20, cylTopY - 60, centerX + 20, cylTopY - 5, "#ef4444", 3);
            ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444"; ctx.fillText("F", centerX + 30, cylTopY - 30);
        }

        // Pressure pm (upward)
        drawArrow(ctx, centerX, airLevelY - 10, centerX, airLevelY - 60, "#10b981", 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#10b981"; ctx.fillText("p_air", centerX + 10, airLevelY - 40);
        
        // Labels
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b";
        ctx.fillText("h2 = " + h2.toFixed(2) + " m", centerX - cylW/2 - 70, (waterY + airLevelY)/2);
        ctx.fillText("h1 = " + h1.toFixed(3) + " m", 525, (mLeftLevel + mRightLevel)/2);
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, fromx, fromy, tox, toy, color, width) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const angle = Math.atan2(toy - fromy, tox - fromx);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(fromx, fromy); ctx.lineTo(tox, toy); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tox, toy);
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(tox - headlen * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI/6), toy - headlen * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill();
    }

    pushBtn.onclick = () => {
        if (isAnimating) return;
        isAnimating = true;
        let targetH2 = 0.4;
        let startH2 = parseFloat(h2S.value);
        let step = 0.005;
        
        const anim = setInterval(() => {
            let curr = parseFloat(h2S.value);
            if (curr < targetH2) {
                h2S.value = (curr + step).toFixed(3);
                update();
            } else {
                clearInterval(anim);
                isAnimating = false;
            }
        }, 20);
    };

    [gS, dS, h2S, rmS].forEach(el => el.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>
```
